# wikiforms.toolforge.org

> WikiForms - The ultimate drag and drop form builder created specifically for Wikimedia tools, components, and templates.

## Home

[WikiForms - Amazing Drag and Drop Form Builder for Wikimedia](https://wikiforms.toolforge.org/): WikiForms - The ultimate drag and drop form builder created specifically for Wikimedia tools, components, and templates.
